full_text:
Xie Piao 解剽
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xie Piao (解剽). Sent by Cao Cao to attack Zhang Lu, inflicting a large defeat. Xie Piao was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
